videos.title: How to Write Headlines That Convert (Using Social Judgement Theory)
videos.description:
In this session, we break down Social Judgment Theory, a psychological model that explains why people almost never change their minds in big leaps, and how to use it to write headlines that actually move people closer to buying.

We analyzed real ads across colostrum, mushroom coffee, barefoot shoes, and skincare, diagnosing exactly why their headlines land in the wrong zone (hint: most sit in indifference) and how to rewrite them to challenge beliefs just one step at a time.
